constraints.description: Canonical root must match the normalized homepage root.
Organization.name must match the extracted entity name when Organization schema is present.
Breadcrumb root must resolve to the homepage canonical.
Multiple Organization schemas must not conflict on name.
Canonical URLs must not represent multiple competing entity roots.
Entity root must not be undefined when schema objects indicate an Organization or Person.
Schema.org vocabulary must be used for structural definition.
If Person schema is present, it must not contradict the owning organization identity.
Breadcrumb path hierarchy must be structurally consistent.
Canonical URL must not contain unnecessary query parameters or tracking tags.
Top-level identity declaration must not conflict across surfaces.
Schema-detected identity must not conflict with the hostname-level entity root.
Homepage must carry at least minimal narrative depth for stable entity reconstruction.
Homepage must expose at least one internal path to its own lattice.
Entity must declare itself via Organization or Person schema to be treated as a primary EEI subject.
Canonical roots must converge to a single registrable domain for the entity perimeter.
Multi-surface entities must carry at least one Organization or Person schema anchor.
Social and sameAs surfaces must substantially overlap to avoid fragmented identity.
Schema-level identity roots must unify to a single root token.
The entity's digital perimeter must be structurally stable.
